Philippines ends rescue efforts for 16 missing after building collapse Al Jazeera At Least 4 Dead and 17 Missing After 9-Story Building Collapses as Rescue Efforts Enter Recovery Phase People.com 4 dead, 17 mostly workers still missing, in collapse of unfinished hotel in the Philippines ABC News - Breaking News, Latest News and Videos Building under construction in Philippines collapses, leaving 1 dead and 21 trapped AP News ‘Like an aeroplane landing’: deadly building collapse shocks Philippine city South China Morning Post
